mission_01.title: Site Entry Protocol
mission_01.description: Establish field terminal connection and locate the first cryo specimen.
mission_01.objective: Scan the Brachiosaurus embryo QR at Site Entry Zone.

mission_02.title: Tri-Horn Extraction
mission_02.description: Brachiosaurus embryo secured. Armored herbivore signature detected in Sector B.
mission_02.objective: Scan the Triceratops embryo QR code.

mission_03.title: River Basin Sweep
mission_03.description: Triceratops secured. Large aquatic predator signature in river basin.

mission_04.title: Shark-Tooth Pursuit
mission_04.description: Spinosaurus recovered. Massive terrestrial predator tracks crossing eastern ridge.

mission_05.title: King of the Kill Zone
mission_05.description: Carcharodontosaurus contained. Apex predator bio-signature escalating nearby.
mission_05.objective: Locate and scan the Tyrannosaurus embryo.

mission_06.title: Hybrid Containment
mission_06.description: Tyrannosaurus secured. Unknown hybrid strain detected — proceed with extreme caution.

mission_07.title: Bull Run Protocol
mission_07.description: Scorpios Rex specimen stabilized. Aggressive carnivore movement near southern fence.

mission_08.title: Giant Recovery
mission_08.description: Toro secured. Largest carnivore signature on record detected in deep sector.

mission_09.title: Pack Hunt Extraction
mission_09.description: Giganotosaurus recovered. Coordinated pack signatures increasing in maintenance corridors.

mission_10.title: Final Specimen
mission_10.description: Velociraptor pack neutralized. Classified hybrid specimen remains at extraction coordinates.

mission_11.title: Cryo Extraction Complete
mission_11.description: All embryos recovered. Initiate final extraction protocol.
mission_11.objective: Proceed to extraction point for final event.
